title: mandevilla pachyphylla
intro: Mandevilla pachyphylla, also known as the wild mandevilla or rock trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mandevilla pachyphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditional herbal preparations of Mandevilla pachyphylla involve infusing the plant's leaves in water or making a decoction to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
